allow: Bash(ls /Users/federico/code/fortran-fast-float/data/ 2>/dev/null || echo "No data dir found"; find /Users/federico/code/fortran-fast-float -name "*.txt" -maxdepth 2 2>/dev/null | head -20)

Bash(cat > /tmp/test_mu64_interop.f90 << 'EOF'
module test_mod
    use iso_fortran_env, only: int64
    use iso_c_binding, only: c_int64_t
    implicit none
    type :: u128
        integer\(int64\) :: lo, hi
    end type
    interface
        pure subroutine mu64_hw\(a, b, lo, hi\) bind\(c, name="ffc_mul_u64_hw"\)
            import :: c_int64_t
            integer\(c_int64_t\), intent\(in\), value :: a, b
            integer\(c_int64_t\), intent\(out\) :: lo, hi
        end subroutine mu64_hw
    end interface
contains
    pure elemental subroutine mu64\(a, b, res\)
        integer\(int64\), intent\(in\) :: a, b
        type\(u128\), intent\(out\) :: res
        call mu64_hw\(a, b, res%lo, res%hi\)
    end subroutine mu64
end module test_mod
EOF
gfortran -O3 -S -o /tmp/test_mu64_interop.s /tmp/test_mu64_interop.f90 && grep -A15 'mu64:' /tmp/test_mu64_interop.s)

Bash(cat > /tmp/test_i128.f90 << 'EOF'
module test_mod
    use iso_fortran_env, only: int64
    use iso_c_binding, only: c_int128_t
    implicit none
    integer, parameter :: has_128 = merge\(1, 0, c_int128_t > 0\)
    integer, parameter :: IK = merge\(c_int128_t, int64, c_int128_t > 0\)
    type :: u128
        integer\(int64\) :: lo, hi
    end type
contains
    pure elemental subroutine mu64\(a, b, res\)
        integer\(int64\), intent\(in\) :: a, b
        type\(u128\), intent\(out\) :: res
        integer\(IK\) :: z
        z = int\(a, IK\) * int\(b, IK\)
        res%lo = int\(z, int64\)
        res%hi = int\(ishft\(z, -64\), int64\)
        ! unsigned correction: signed→unsigned high word
        if \(a < 0\) res%hi = res%hi + b
        if \(b < 0\) res%hi = res%hi + a
    end subroutine mu64
end module test_mod
EOF
gfortran -O3 -S -o /tmp/test_i128.s /tmp/test_i128.f90 && grep -A25 'mu64:' /tmp/test_i128.s)
